note: Curated SHA-2 NIST CAVP 186-3 RSA SigVer subset matching rscrypto supported verification profiles: PKCS1v1.5 RSA-2048/3072 with SHA-256/384/512, and PSS RSA-2048/3072 with SHA-256/384/512 using explicit salt lengths from the response files. SHA-1, SHA-224, and RSA-1024 are intentionally excluded.
